name: MAGNACHIP SEMICONDUCTOR Corp
summary: Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation is a designer and manufacturer of analog and mixed-signal power semiconductor platform solutions. Products include Power Analog Solutions (MOSFETs, IGBTs) and Power IC products (AC-DC/DC-DC converters, LED drivers, PMICs, regulators, level shifters) serving industrial, automotive, communication, consumer, and computing markets. With approximately 45 years of operating history and 950+ registered patents, the company operates design and manufacturing facilities in Korea and sold approximately 350 distinct products in 2025, generating $178.9 million in total revenues.
